productName: Ooowee - JUICED 5/1G Infused PreRoll - Purple Rain - FaceLock - 5g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Facelock and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with a balanced head-and-body experience. A little goes a long way.
